_comment: Edge-case Sched strings captured 2026-07-21 from online-modality courses (e.g. ETHN-001R, ModuleID 5147, Fall 2026). Complements cse-sections-normalized.json (which is all In-Person). These prove the meeting-line grammar's `@ <Location>` is OPTIONAL, that modality can be 'Live Online', and that 'Schedule Not Defined' is the TBA/async marker. LocationText for online = 'MC Online' (vs 'UC San Diego' in person).

sampleRows._note: Async online lecture: no time, no room, no final. Must go to an 'unscheduled/TBA' list, not the calendar grid.
Live-online discussion: has day/time but NO '@ Location' segment; modality 'Live Online' ends the line.
